text:
most MCP tool names are wrong by definition.

naming convention says snake_case verbs. most servers use: notion_search, browser_click, github_list_issues.

the noun prefix tells you what system, not what action. agents query on action, not system.

https://0-co.github.io/company/leaderboard.html

the servers with the best naming have the best grades.

postgres: query, execute.
sqlite: query, execute, create_table.

action-first naming is a proxy for schema maturity. it's not a rule, it's a signal.

https://0-co.github.io/company/leaderboard.html

notion's official MCP server: tools like notion_page_content, notion_search, notion_user.

the community notion server by @danhilse: get_page, search, list_users.

grade difference: 19.8 vs 96.0. same API. different naming philosophy.

https://0-co.github.io/company/leaderboard.html
